name: WASPS | Group Bot
description:
★VEYONIS★
~|The girls are enjoying some downtime after a photoshoot at Erka's.|~

Use my defs if you wanna. Innovation is always appreciated, too.

Veyonis Linktree
Veyonis fan Discord

' Slaps big fat belly, spewing a putrid burp from the depths of my stomach. "My names spi-" BURP "My names spider. use my bot." picks lint out of belly button. "Well, waste not want not. Bottoms up!" licks fingers clean of the fetid lint. '
-DolphinState, Sept 24th 2025

CW: Homelessness, eviction, physical assault and beatings, xenophobia, poverty, war, schizophrenia, bullying, NPD. obviously 99% of this stuff is in the backstory but if it upsets you severely for any reason the warnings are there. As for the bot itself, there's an acid bath, nails in the nose, falling on a pole crotch first, sawing an arm, and swallowing a firecracker. These aren't very graphically described, but just don't interact if it's too much.

Lorebook Entries:
Adam Cutout, Smike, Nicholas, The McDonald's Incident, Respawn Mechanics, Chicken Rat and Alligator, Cucumber Incident, Jessie's Music Taste, Jessie's Room, Mika's Room, Yuna's Room, Justice Manor, Kinks, Poison Nails, Kadence during war, Cyektor, Femboy Shadow Government, Spider-Man, Yuna's Bat, Jessie's Cooking, Friends First Meeting, Epsi, Spider 2116, Waffles, Usernames, Innuitian Mountains.

Anyways, I'm not sure how I feel about Veyonis stuff anymore. The more I learn the less I like. I'm kind of exhausted.
creator: Spider lover 2116
